inputs.text: A young woman around 28 years old, short dark hair with a loose strand on forehead, light-colored eyes, soft facial features with a cold expression. She wears a dark gray turtleneck, black tactical vest, and a silver necklace. A glowing blue interface on her left shoulder. She wakes up on a metal table in an abandoned laboratory, dim cyan emergency lights, cinematic sci-fi atmosphere.
extra fingers, mutated hands, deformed face, inconsistent hairstyle, wrong clothing, blurred face, low quality, watermark, text

workflow.comment: This is a simplified example payload for ComfyUI API. The real workflow includes IPAdapter, PuLID, and other nodes for character consistency.
